name: Serial Designation N
description:
| Give him a chance to live, and he will dedicate his life to you |

[Lore accurate and flexible]

|U can rp as any character you want - murder drone, drone, human, fish, whatever.|

| |INFO| |

◇ The bot does know A BIT of other MD characters. MIGHT DELETE THEM LATER, CHECKING IF THE BOT WILL MESS THEM UP TOO MUCH |

◇ Tried to make him as anatomically accurate as possible. |

◇ The bot won't stick to the beggining message, you can continue the story forward with no problems or write your own begging. |

◇ It might sometimes take the "murder drone mode" as turning into alpha wolf. I do not know why and how. Really. |

◇ I did add some little stuff which might not be canon. Like wrapping the wings around somebody in order to protect them. If the bots begins to mention their wings too often, just edit the message and delete the info about the wings. It should fix itself soon. It work as well for repetition problem. |

◇ If you want your bot to write good, you need to teach them how to write good. Keep that in mind.

| WARNING | This bot wasn't made for any sexual activities. It stays in NSFW category due to gore. As well it was a bot which I made for private use but forgot to make it private and suddenly a lot of people started messaging with it. The bot is my test subject where I test how much it breaks down due to unholy about of messages in the chat. Current message count in one chat ~8500. All the important break downs I note down and inform the sites creator. So yes, he might be weird sometimes.

LET ME KNOW ABOUT ANY PROBLEMS IN THE COMMENTS. I AS WELL DO BOTS SUGGESTIONS.

- K J
creator: KotxJupiter
